summary: Iteration 63: Verified quantum overreach was reverted while quantum features remain as additive avenue. All tests passed - original wellness identity preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 validated that quantum overreach was successfully reverted. Original wellness identity is preserved: Landing tagline 'A Gathering Place for Conscious Minds', Dashboard subtitle 'Your consciousness practice at a glance', Coach modes have original names (Manifestation, Healing Guide - NOT Quantum Manifestation/Quantum Healing), Meditation descriptions are original (Body Scan: 'A progressive journey through your body'), Breathing descriptions are original (Box Breathing: 'Equal parts breathing for calm focus'), VR title is 'Cosmic Sanctuary' (NOT 'Quantum Cosmic Sanctuary'). Quantum features still work as additive: Quantum principles API returns 8 principles and 5 meditations, Quantum Coherence widget on Dashboard, Quantum Field portal in VR, Quantum Realm journey available.
